title: Corporate Sector System Development Programs
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Corporate Sector System Development Programs''', also known as '''D-Progs''', was a joint development project coordinated by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]]. Overseen by the [[Coalition for Progress/Legends|Coalition for Progress]], it gave economic aid to frontier [[Planet/Legends|worlds]] that had suffered during the end of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], and was considered a success.
